refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what customer churn means and why it's important. Also, I should learn how predictive models work and what overfitting is.
I need to know what historical sales and interaction data is available. It would be helpful to get a description of the data set and its features.
I should figure out what performance metrics I need to evaluate the model, like accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score. I need to know how to calculate these.
I should learn how to check if the model is overfitting. I think this might involve looking at the training and validation accuracy.
I need to learn some techniques to improve the model, like cross-validation or regularization, but I'm not sure what those mean yet.
I need to decide how to organize my report. It should probably have sections for the analysis results, metrics, and recommendations, but I'm not sure how to format it.
